opens_later_options: because it opens later options your build is already pointing toward
grows_in_value: because it becomes more valuable if you continue down this path
species_window: because this is one of your strongest species-specific opportunities early on
conditional_window: because the conditions that make this shine are close at hand right now
patches_missing_lane: because it patches a missing lane in your build instead of duplicating what you already have
expands_class_skills: because it expands your useful class-skill access while that still matters most
supports_group_role: because it strengthens what you contribute to the rest of the group
improves_positioning: because it improves your positioning and freedom of movement
adds_control_layer: because it gives you another way to shape the battlefield instead of only reacting to it
improves_defense: because it adds a defensive layer your build can actually use
adds_recovery_tools: because it gives you recovery or support tools that stay relevant in real play
improves_action_economy: because it improves how efficiently you act from round to round
fits_melee_identity: because it fits the melee pressure identity you are already building toward
fits_ranged_identity: because it fits the ranged pressure style your choices are reinforcing
fits_support_identity: because it fits the support-and-leadership role your build is growing into
fits_control_identity: because it fits the control-oriented way you are approaching problems
force_capacity_realized: because your current Force Training attribute is high enough to make the extra capacity matter now
force_capacity_low: because your current Force Training attribute is still too low to realize the full payoff yet
force_execution_realized: because your current Use the Force attribute lets you capitalize on this in play immediately
force_execution_low: because your current Use the Force attribute makes this less reliable than it looks on paper
strength_supports_choice: because your strength is high enough to cash out the upside here right away
strength_is_limited: because your current strength makes this more of a future setup piece than an immediate spike
dexterity_supports_choice: because your dexterity is already carrying the style this option wants
dexterity_is_limited: because your current dexterity makes cleaner alternatives more attractive right now
constitution_supports_choice: because your resilience is high enough to support the risks this option invites
constitution_is_limited: because your current durability makes this harder to leverage safely right now
intelligence_supports_choice: because your intelligence makes the technical and knowledge side of this option pay off
wisdom_supports_choice: because your wisdom supports the awareness and judgment this option asks for
charisma_supports_choice: because your charisma is high enough to make the social or Force-facing payoff real
background_patches_training: because this background patches a training gap you may not get another easy chance to fix soon
background_supports_prestige: because this background helps lay track for a prestige path you appear to be approaching
immediate_fit_high: because it fits what your build can make use of right now
immediate_fit_moderate: because it is usable now even if it is not the most explosive option immediately
short_term_value_high: because it sets up the next few levels cleanly instead of only helping in the abstract
identity_alignment_high: because it matches the direction your overall build keeps pointing toward
opportunity_window_open: because this is the kind of opportunity that matters most while your build is still taking shape
